about.intro: I am Furqan Ahmad Bhat from Baramulla, pursuing a Bachelor's in Data Science and Physics.
about.approach: I build real-world intelligent systems using AI, IoT, and data-driven approaches.
about.focus: My focus is on solving practical problems with scalable systems.

projects.title: Apple Grading System
projects.description: A CNN-based system to classify apples based on quality.
projects.problem: Manual grading is slow and inconsistent.
projects.impact: Improves efficiency and accuracy in agriculture.

projects.title: Tiwzz
projects.description: A platform connecting rural restaurants to customers.

projects.title: IoT Health Device
